title: Night Flight
writer: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry, Oliver H.P. Garrett, Wells Root
actors: John Barrymore, Helen Hayes, Clark Gable
plot: Polio breaks out in Rio de Janeiro, the serum is in Santiago and there's only one way to get the medicine where it's desperately needed: flown in by daring pilots who risk the treacherous weather and forbidding peaks of the Andes.
